tasks.description: Remove noisy onUpdate calls, track turn/commands inside loop, emit single aggregated summary
tasks.changes:
src/core/slinger-agent.ts (full file) BEFORE→AFTER diff
+ Removed these early onUpdate calls in execute(): 
+   '🏹 Slinger deployed', 
+   '📐 Context:', 
+   '📖 Slinger preloading' 
+ Inside the command loop, accumulated turn count and commands run count. 
+ In writeSlingerLog(), added single aggregated onUpdate line before return:
+   `onUpdate?.({ text: '🏹 Slinger ${slingerPersona.name}: ${turn-1} turn(s), task: ${researchTask.slice(0,60)}' })` 
+ Kept existing writeEventFn calls (slinger_start, slinger_done) unchanged — those go to events.jsonl not the war record.
